title: phyllanthus gabonensis
intro: Phyllanthus gabonensis, also known as Antillous, is a plant species native to Central Africa, classified in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Phyllanthus gabonensis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus gabonensis are typically made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
